code:
%%{FinTech_PaymentGateway}}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [FinTech_LedgerService] state Pending {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue] } state Approved {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [FinTech_AuthVault] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为支付网关设计一个评论状态流转图。核心场景是：用户创建评论后先进入待审核状态，通过风控检测后才能对外可见。另外，被拒绝的评论需要记录拒因并同步到认证中心。
明白。我梳理一下：起点是TransactionQueue，创建后进入Pending；Pending可以走向Approved或Rejected。Approved之后要接入FraudDetection吗？还有Deleted状态的处理逻辑是怎样的？
对，Approved内部要走FraudDetection，通过后才是Visible。Deleted是终态，所有状态都能直接删除，删除后要归档到LedgerService。另外Pending内部其实有个AwaitingModeration的子状态，和TransactionQueue有回环。
好的，我先画出主干：Pending、Approved、Rejected三个主状态，Deleted指向LedgerService。Pending内部嵌套AwaitingModeration，Approved内部接入FraudDetection再到Visible。Rejected这边需要怎么处理？
Rejected内部也要走FraudDetection，但结果是Hidden。Hidden之后可以添加拒因，进入WithReason状态，最终同步到AuthVault。还有，Visible状态下的评论应该支持编辑，编辑后回到Visible。
收到。Rejected→Hidden→WithReason→AuthVault，Visible和Edited之间双向流转。我补充几个注释说明各状态的业务含义，比如Pending是等待审核，Approved是可见可编辑，Rejected是隐藏可填拒因，Deleted是永久移除。

注释内容再精确一点：Pending要强调"await moderation"，Approved强调"visible and can be edited"，Rejected强调"hidden with optional rejection reason"，Deleted强调"permanently removed"。另外确认下，Pending内部的AwaitingModeration要回连到TransactionQueue。
已调整。所有注释和回环关系都已落实，Rejected的WithReason指向AuthVault，Deleted统一归档到LedgerService。整个状态机现在覆盖了评论从创建、审核、展示到删除的全生命周期，各微服务的交互也清晰了。
